---
name: Feature request
about: An improvement to the director, a workflow, onboard or the docs
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem** — what today's behavior costs you

**Proposed shape** — how it could work (director flag, config key, workflow
arg, new phase?)

**Alternatives considered**

**Which invariants does it touch?** (see CONTRIBUTING.md — quiet default,
model-tier fallback, `my-` contract, approval-gated generation)
